description: Multi-vehicle collision on Highway 101 northbound near Exit 12. Two lanes blocked. Fire department dispatched.

location.area_name: Mountain View, CA - Highway 101 & Rengstorff Ave

route_a_proposal.reasoning: Surface Streets bypass avoids blocked highway. Higher civilian impact but fastest available path.

route_b_proposal.reasoning: Shoreline route avoids residential areas. Longer ETA but minimal civilian disruption.

negotiation_result.reasoning: Route A wins: accident severity demands fastest response despite higher civilian impact.

explainability.decision: Route ambulance via Surface Streets bypass
explainability.reasoning_one_liner: Multi-vehicle collision blocks Highway 101. Surface Streets bypass saves 8 minutes despite impacting 18 vehicles.
explainability.counterfactual: Without intervention: 18 min ETA. With this plan: 10 min ETA. Saves 8 minutes.

expected_outputs.success_message: Ambulance routed via Surface Streets bypass. Arrival time: 8:40 AM.
